subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the first salutation uttered by the Tongue of Grandeur before the creation of earth and heaven, O thou Name of Há and Dawning-Place from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول سلام نطق به لسان العظمه قبل خلق الارض و السماء علیک یا اسم الحاء و المشرق من
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
